description: CompositionBlack shirt made of 100% linen, comes with collar stiffeners and has an extra pair of stiffeners included, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, short sleeves, a patch pocket on the left chest, branding embroidered on the pocket and a curved hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryStylish and subtle, this shirt from the arrow sport collection is made with fine attention to detail that will quickly elevate it to a wardrobe favourite. The short sleeves add a summery touch to your formal look, while the linen fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with simple chinos for a knockout weekend style.Model StatisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
